description: Bounded Mistral instruct context parity bucket for exact Mistral 7B Instruct v0.3 Q8_0. The synthetic recall prompt stays within a 512-token reference context so prompt-token and generated-token parity can be compared without implying broad/full Mistral support.

prompts.note: Bounded synthetic recall prompt for the Mistral 512-context bucket; validate actual prompt token count from the parity report.

messages.content: You are checking deterministic local mistral parity for a bounded 512 context bucket. Answer with the final requested marker only.
